details: The “Map Simplification Process” is implemented by the Haridwar - Roorkee Development Authority under Housing Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to simplify and expedite the approval of residential and commercial property maps through an efficient online system.
benefits: Approval of residential maps is being provided within 15 days, and approval of commercial maps within 30 days.
eligibility: All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.

online: An online system has been set up for landowners in Haridwar district to obtain approval for their private residential and commercial properties. Landowners can submit applications from their homes and have their maps approved within the prescribed time period.

documents_required: The required documents must be submitted as per the guidelines of the Haridwar-Roorkee Development Authority.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.

faqs.question: How can landowners apply for map approval?
faqs.answer: Landowners can apply online through the official system from their homes.

faqs.question: How long does it take to get a residential map approved?
faqs.answer: Residential maps are approved within 15 days of submission.

faqs.question: How long does it take to get a commercial map approved?
faqs.answer: Commercial maps are approved within 30 days of submission.

faqs.question: What types of properties are covered under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Both private residential and commercial properties are covered under this scheme.
